rows.label: xs08060170_MSG0001
rows.name: Seems like their numbers are getting smaller, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060170_MSG0002
rows.name:
Elma-san, it looks like we'll manage
to hold the East Gate after all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060170_MSG0003
rows.name:
Too few[ST:wide ]—
Is this really[ST:wide ]— all of them[ST:wide ]—?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060170_MSG0005
rows.name:
Sorry. You're right. Just a little longer.
Let's keep going.[ST:wait ]
